case_title: THE CITY TOW VS GIPPSON, JOHN LEE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY THE CITY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT GIPPSON, JOHN LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GIPPSON, JOHN LEE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIPPSON, JOHN LEE $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,560.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GIPPSON, JOHN LEE HEARING SET FOR JUL-21-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-21-1999, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT GIPPSON, JOHN LEE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
